name: udt_basic_methods_valid
code:
//@version=6
indicator("UDT Basic", overlay=true)

type Point
    float x
    float y

    method move(this<Point>, float newX, float newY) =>
        this.x := newX
        this.y := newY

    method distance(this<Point>, Point other) =>
        math.sqrt(math.pow(this.x - other.x, 2) + math.pow(this.y - other.y, 2))

var Point point1 = Point.new(10.0, 20.0)
var Point point2 = Point.new(30.0, 40.0)
point1.move(15.0, 25.0)
dist = point1.distance(point2)
plot(dist)

name: udt_duplicate_field_error

plot(close)

name: udt_method_missing_this
code:
//@version=6
indicator("UDT Missing This")

type Counter
    float total

method add(float amount) =>
    total := total + amount

var Counter counter = Counter.new(0.0)
counter.add(1.0)
plot(counter.total)
